nodes.label: Source Modulator Signal
nodes.description: Raw modulation signal from the selected source modulator in the GlobalModulatorContainer

nodes.label: Aux Modulator Signal
nodes.description: Auxiliary modulation signal from the selected aux modulator in the GlobalModulatorContainer

nodes.label: SourceIndex
nodes.description: Selects the primary modulation source (-1 = disconnected)

nodes.label: AuxIndex
nodes.description: Selects the auxiliary modulation source (-1 = disconnected)

nodes.label: Invert Source
nodes.description: Optionally flips source signal (1 - signal) when Inverted is enabled

nodes.label: Inverted
nodes.description: Normal or Inverted -- flips source signal before mode application

nodes.label: Apply Mode + Aux
nodes.description: Combines source and aux signals using selected mode formula (Scale/Unipolar/Bipolar) with zero position offset

nodes.label: Intensity
nodes.description: Overall modulation depth -- sets the aux channel's base value

nodes.label: AuxIntensity
nodes.description: Controls how much the aux modulator signal affects intensity scaling (0-1)

nodes.label: ZeroPosition
nodes.description: Left (0.0) or Center (0.5) -- shifts modulation center in Scale mode

nodes.label: Modulation Output
nodes.description: Normalised modulation value sent to connected parameter targets

nodes.label: Audio Out
nodes.description: Audio channel 0 with modulation applied (always writes -- no ProcessSignal toggle)

nodes.label: Display Buffer
nodes.description: Ring buffer for ModPlotter visualisation (always enabled)
